case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. ZORO, LLC

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ZORO, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT ORO, LLP'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE TAX JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ZORO, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE OR VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NO POSSIBLE MERITORIOUS DEFENSE TO JUDGMENT IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR, SO NO USEFUL PURPOSE IS SERVED BY GRANTING THE MOTION. THE DENIAL OF THE MOTION IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT SEEKING A STAY OF ENFORCEMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZORO, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZORO, LLC $34,093.02 PRINCIPAL, $13,807.67 INTEREST, $3,409.30 TAX PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $51,309.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rod Divelbiss, Esq., of Collette Erickson Farmer & O'Neill LLP, Tel. 415.788.4646, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Debra D. Lew, Esq., Asst. Tax Collector Attorney , Tel. 415.554.7888, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ZORO, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE OR VACATE JUDGMENT is Denied. Defendant has no possible meritorious defense to judgment in plaintiff's favor, so no useful purpose is served by granting the motion. The denial of the motion is without prejudice to defendant seeking a stay of enforcement of the judgment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
